suite.name: Tests
User Makes One Way Call

kw.name: Setup Voice Test Environment
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Device By Type
kw.doc: Get a device by its type name.

kw.name: Get Device By Type
kw.doc: Get a device by its type name.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Get Device By Type
kw.doc: Get a device by its type name.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: WARNING: No SIPServer available - voice tests will be skipped
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Device By Type
kw.doc: Get a device by its type name.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Get Devices By Type
kw.doc: Get all devices of a specific type.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Discover phones by location
kw.doc: Classify SIP phones by network location (LAN/WAN).

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: The SIP server is running and operational
kw.doc: Verify SIP server (Kamailio) is running.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice test environment initialized: 3 phones (1 LAN, 2 WAN)
kw.arg: Voice test environment initialized: ${phone_count} phones (${lan_count} LAN, ${wan_count} WAN)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Initialize voice test environment with SIP phones.

test.name: UC-12348-Main-V1: LAN Phone Calls WAN Phone (NAT Outbound)

kw.name: Check Voice Test Preconditions
Skip
kw.arg: No SIPServer available in testbed - skipping voice test
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${PHONE_COUNT} SIP phone(s), but test requires ${min_phones} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${lan_count} LAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_lan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${wan_count} WAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_wan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice test preconditions met: 3 phones (1 LAN, 2 WAN), SIPServer available
kw.arg: Voice test preconditions met: ${PHONE_COUNT} phones (${lan_count} LAN, ${wan_count} WAN), SIPServer available
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Check if the testbed meets voice test requirements.

kw.name: Setup Phones For Scenario
Assign phones for scenario
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee from location-based phone lists.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Assign caller and callee roles
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee roles to phones.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server
kw.doc: Register a phone with the SIP server.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server
kw.doc: Register a phone with the SIP server.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.
Assign caller and callee by network location, register them, and set roles.

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone dialing 2000... ✓ Phone lan_phone dialed 2000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: The callee phone should start ringing
kw.doc: Alias for Verify phone is ringing.

kw.name: Callee answers call
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone answering call... ✓ Phone wan_phone answered call
kw.doc: Callee answers incoming call.

kw.name: Both phones should be connected
kw.msg: ✓ Phone lan_phone reached connected state ✓ Phone wan_phone reached connected state
kw.doc: Verify both phones are in connected state.

kw.name: A bidirectional RTP media session should be established
kw.doc: Verify RTP media session is established.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice communication established through CPE NAT
kw.arg: Voice communication established through CPE NAT
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Caller hangs up
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone lan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Caller hangs up the call.

kw.name: Verify SIP call terminated
kw.msg: ✓ SIP server terminated call (0 active calls)
kw.doc: Verify SIP server terminated the call.

kw.name: Both phones should return to idle state
kw.msg: ✓ Phone lan_phone reached idle state ✓ Phone wan_phone reached idle state
kw.doc: Verify both phones returned to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone lan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Clean up phones after each test. Uses Run Keyword And Ignore Error because variables may not be set if test was skipped or failed early.

test.doc: LAN phone calls WAN phone - tests NAT outbound traversal Requires: 1 LAN + 1 WAN phone, SIPServer

test.name: UC-12348-Main-V2: LAN Phone Calls WAN Phone 2 (NAT Outbound)

kw.name: Check Voice Test Preconditions
Skip
kw.arg: No SIPServer available in testbed - skipping voice test
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${PHONE_COUNT} SIP phone(s), but test requires ${min_phones} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${lan_count} LAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_lan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${wan_count} WAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_wan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice test preconditions met: 3 phones (1 LAN, 2 WAN), SIPServer available
kw.arg: Voice test preconditions met: ${PHONE_COUNT} phones (${lan_count} LAN, ${wan_count} WAN), SIPServer available
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Check if the testbed meets voice test requirements.

kw.name: Setup Phones For Scenario
Assign phones for scenario
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee from location-based phone lists.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Assign caller and callee roles
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee roles to phones.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server
kw.doc: Register a phone with the SIP server.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server
kw.doc: Register a phone with the SIP server.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.
Assign caller and callee by network location, register them, and set roles.

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone dialing 3000... ✓ Phone lan_phone dialed 3000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: The callee phone should start ringing
kw.doc: Alias for Verify phone is ringing.

kw.name: Callee answers call
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 answering call... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 answered call
kw.doc: Callee answers incoming call.

kw.name: Both phones should be connected
kw.msg: ✓ Phone lan_phone reached connected state ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached connected state
kw.doc: Verify both phones are in connected state.

kw.name: A bidirectional RTP media session should be established
kw.doc: Verify RTP media session is established.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice communication established through CPE NAT
kw.arg: Voice communication established through CPE NAT
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Caller hangs up
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone lan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Caller hangs up the call.

kw.name: Verify SIP call terminated
kw.msg: ✓ SIP server terminated call (0 active calls)
kw.doc: Verify SIP server terminated the call.

kw.name: Both phones should return to idle state
kw.msg: ✓ Phone lan_phone reached idle state ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached idle state
kw.doc: Verify both phones returned to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone lan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Clean up phones after each test. Uses Run Keyword And Ignore Error because variables may not be set if test was skipped or failed early.

test.doc: LAN phone calls WAN phone 2 - tests NAT outbound traversal Requires: 1 LAN + 2 WAN phones, SIPServer

test.name: UC-12348-Main-V3: WAN Phone Calls LAN Phone (NAT Inbound)

kw.name: Check Voice Test Preconditions
Skip
kw.arg: No SIPServer available in testbed - skipping voice test
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${PHONE_COUNT} SIP phone(s), but test requires ${min_phones} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${lan_count} LAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_lan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${wan_count} WAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_wan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice test preconditions met: 3 phones (1 LAN, 2 WAN), SIPServer available
kw.arg: Voice test preconditions met: ${PHONE_COUNT} phones (${lan_count} LAN, ${wan_count} WAN), SIPServer available
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Check if the testbed meets voice test requirements.

kw.name: Setup Phones For Scenario
Assign phones for scenario
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee from location-based phone lists.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Assign caller and callee roles
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee roles to phones.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server
kw.doc: Register a phone with the SIP server.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
Get Device Property

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server

Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.
Assign caller and callee by network location, register them, and set roles.

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone dialing 1000... ✓ Phone wan_phone dialed 1000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: The callee phone should start ringing
kw.doc: Alias for Verify phone is ringing.

kw.name: Callee answers call
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone answering call... ✓ Phone lan_phone answered call
kw.doc: Callee answers incoming call.

kw.name: Both phones should be connected
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone reached connected state ✓ Phone lan_phone reached connected state
kw.doc: Verify both phones are in connected state.

kw.name: A bidirectional RTP media session should be established
kw.doc: Verify RTP media session is established.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice communication established through CPE NAT
kw.arg: Voice communication established through CPE NAT
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Caller hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Caller hangs up the call.

kw.name: Verify SIP call terminated
kw.msg: ✓ SIP server terminated call (0 active calls)
kw.doc: Verify SIP server terminated the call.

kw.name: Both phones should return to idle state
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone reached idle state ✓ Phone lan_phone reached idle state
kw.doc: Verify both phones returned to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone lan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Clean up phones after each test. Uses Run Keyword And Ignore Error because variables may not be set if test was skipped or failed early.

test.doc: WAN phone calls LAN phone - tests NAT inbound traversal Requires: 1 LAN + 1 WAN phone, SIPServer

test.name: UC-12348-Main-V4: WAN Phone Calls WAN Phone 2 (Direct WAN)

kw.name: Check Voice Test Preconditions
Skip
kw.arg: No SIPServer available in testbed - skipping voice test
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${PHONE_COUNT} SIP phone(s), but test requires ${min_phones} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${lan_count} LAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_lan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${wan_count} WAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_wan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice test preconditions met: 3 phones (1 LAN, 2 WAN), SIPServer available
kw.arg: Voice test preconditions met: ${PHONE_COUNT} phones (${lan_count} LAN, ${wan_count} WAN), SIPServer available
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Check if the testbed meets voice test requirements.

kw.name: Setup Phones For Scenario
Assign phones for scenario
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee from location-based phone lists.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Assign caller and callee roles
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee roles to phones.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server
kw.doc: Register a phone with the SIP server.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.
Assign caller and callee by network location, register them, and set roles.

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone dialing 3000... ✓ Phone wan_phone dialed 3000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: The callee phone should start ringing
kw.doc: Alias for Verify phone is ringing.

kw.name: Callee answers call
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 answering call... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 answered call
kw.doc: Callee answers incoming call.

kw.name: Both phones should be connected
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone reached connected state ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached connected state
kw.doc: Verify both phones are in connected state.

kw.name: A bidirectional RTP media session should be established
kw.doc: Verify RTP media session is established.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice communication established without NAT traversal
kw.arg: Voice communication established without NAT traversal
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Caller hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Caller hangs up the call.

kw.name: Verify SIP call terminated
kw.msg: ✓ SIP server terminated call (0 active calls)
kw.doc: Verify SIP server terminated the call.

kw.name: Both phones should return to idle state
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone reached idle state ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached idle state
kw.doc: Verify both phones returned to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Clean up phones after each test. Uses Run Keyword And Ignore Error because variables may not be set if test was skipped or failed early.

test.doc: WAN phone calls another WAN phone - direct WAN communication Requires: 2 WAN phones, SIPServer

test.name: UC-12348-Main-V5: WAN Phone 2 Calls LAN Phone (NAT Inbound)

kw.name: Check Voice Test Preconditions
Skip
kw.arg: No SIPServer available in testbed - skipping voice test
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.
Assign caller and callee by network location, register them, and set roles.

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 dialing 1000... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 dialed 1000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: The callee phone should start ringing
kw.doc: Alias for Verify phone is ringing.

kw.name: Callee answers call
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone answering call... ✓ Phone lan_phone answered call
kw.doc: Callee answers incoming call.

kw.name: Both phones should be connected
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached connected state ✓ Phone lan_phone reached connected state
kw.doc: Verify both phones are in connected state.

kw.name: A bidirectional RTP media session should be established
kw.doc: Verify RTP media session is established.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice communication established through CPE NAT
kw.arg: Voice communication established through CPE NAT
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Caller hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 hung up
kw.doc: Caller hangs up the call.

kw.name: Verify SIP call terminated
kw.msg: ✓ SIP server terminated call (0 active calls)
kw.doc: Verify SIP server terminated the call.

kw.name: Both phones should return to idle state
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached idle state ✓ Phone lan_phone reached idle state
kw.doc: Verify both phones returned to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone lan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Clean up phones after each test. Uses Run Keyword And Ignore Error because variables may not be set if test was skipped or failed early.

test.doc: WAN phone 2 calls LAN phone - tests NAT inbound traversal Requires: 1 LAN + 2 WAN phones, SIPServer

test.name: UC-12348-Main-V6: WAN Phone 2 Calls WAN Phone (Direct WAN)

kw.name: Check Voice Test Preconditions
Skip
kw.arg: No SIPServer available in testbed - skipping voice test
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${PHONE_COUNT} SIP phone(s), but test requires ${min_phones} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${lan_count} LAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_lan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${wan_count} WAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_wan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice test preconditions met: 3 phones (1 LAN, 2 WAN), SIPServer available
kw.arg: Voice test preconditions met: ${PHONE_COUNT} phones (${lan_count} LAN, ${wan_count} WAN), SIPServer available
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Check if the testbed meets voice test requirements.

kw.name: Setup Phones For Scenario
Assign phones for scenario
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee from location-based phone lists.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Assign caller and callee roles
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee roles to phones.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server
kw.doc: Register a phone with the SIP server.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 dialing 2000... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 dialed 2000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: The callee phone should start ringing
kw.doc: Alias for Verify phone is ringing.

kw.name: Callee answers call
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone answering call... ✓ Phone wan_phone answered call
kw.doc: Callee answers incoming call.

kw.name: Both phones should be connected
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached connected state ✓ Phone wan_phone reached connected state
kw.doc: Verify both phones are in connected state.

kw.name: A bidirectional RTP media session should be established
kw.doc: Verify RTP media session is established.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice communication established without NAT traversal
kw.arg: Voice communication established without NAT traversal
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Caller hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 hung up
kw.doc: Caller hangs up the call.

kw.name: Verify SIP call terminated
kw.msg: ✓ SIP server terminated call (0 active calls)
kw.doc: Verify SIP server terminated the call.

kw.name: Both phones should return to idle state
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached idle state ✓ Phone wan_phone reached idle state
kw.doc: Verify both phones returned to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log

Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Clean up phones after each test. Uses Run Keyword And Ignore Error because variables may not be set if test was skipped or failed early.

kw.name: Verify phone is idle
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone is in idle state
kw.doc: Verify phone is in idle state.

kw.name: Dial Invalid Number
Phone dials number
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone calling 9999... ✓ Phone wan_phone called 9999
kw.doc: Phone dials a specific number.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Dial an unregistered/invalid phone number.

kw.name: Verify Invalid Number Response
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Verify SIP server returns 404 for invalid number.

kw.name: Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.

kw.name: Verify Caller Returns To Idle
Wait for phone state
kw.doc: Wait for phone to reach expected state.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Verify caller phone returns to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

Phone hangs up

kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Verify phone is idle
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone is in idle state
kw.doc: Verify phone is in idle state.

kw.name: Simulate Busy Callee
Log
kw.msg: Callee is in an active call (simulated busy state)
kw.arg: Callee is in an active call (simulated busy state)
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Simulate callee being in an active call (busy state).

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone dialing 3000... ✓ Phone wan_phone dialed 3000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: Verify Busy Response
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Verify callee returns 486 Busy Here.

kw.name: Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.

kw.name: Verify Caller Returns To Idle
Wait for phone state
kw.doc: Wait for phone to reach expected state.

kw.name: Log

Verify caller phone returns to idle state.

Run Keyword And Ignore Error

kw.name: Verify phone is idle
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone is in idle state
kw.doc: Verify phone is in idle state.

kw.name: Verify phone is idle
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone2 is in idle state
kw.doc: Verify phone is in idle state.

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone dialing 3000... ✓ Phone wan_phone dialed 3000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: The callee phone should start ringing
kw.doc: Alias for Verify phone is ringing.

kw.name: Wait For Call Timeout
Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Wait for the no-answer timeout period.

kw.name: Verify Timeout Response
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Verify SIP server sends timeout response.

kw.name: Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.

kw.name: Verify Caller Returns To Idle
Wait for phone state
kw.doc: Wait for phone to reach expected state.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Verify caller phone returns to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone is in idle state
kw.doc: Verify phone is in idle state.

kw.name: Verify phone is idle
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone2 is in idle state
kw.doc: Verify phone is in idle state.

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone dialing 3000... ✓ Phone wan_phone dialed 3000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: The callee phone should start ringing
kw.doc: Alias for Verify phone is ringing.

kw.name: Phone rejects call
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 rejecting call... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached idle state ✓ Phone wan_phone2 rejected call with 603 Decline
kw.doc: Reject incoming call with 603 Decline response.

kw.name: Verify Rejection Response
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Verify SIP server sends rejection response.

kw.name: Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.

kw.name: Verify Caller Returns To Idle
Wait for phone state
kw.doc: Wait for phone to reach expected state.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Verify caller phone returns to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Clean up phones after each test. Uses Run Keyword And Ignore Error because variables may not be set if test was skipped or failed early.

test.doc: Extension: Callee actively rejects the incoming call Requires: 2 WAN phones

test.name: UC-12348-15a: RTP Media Fails To Establish

kw.name: Check Voice Test Preconditions
Skip
kw.arg: No SIPServer available in testbed - skipping voice test
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${PHONE_COUNT} SIP phone(s), but test requires ${min_phones} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${lan_count} LAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_lan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Skip
kw.arg: Testbed has ${wan_count} WAN phone(s), but test requires ${min_wan} - skipping
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Voice test preconditions met: 3 phones (1 LAN, 2 WAN), SIPServer available
kw.arg: Voice test preconditions met: ${PHONE_COUNT} phones (${lan_count} LAN, ${wan_count} WAN), SIPServer available
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Check if the testbed meets voice test requirements.

kw.name: Setup Phones For Scenario
Assign phones for scenario
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee from location-based phone lists.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Set Test Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current test.

kw.name: Assign caller and callee roles
kw.doc: Assign caller and callee roles to phones.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server
kw.doc: Register a phone with the SIP server.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On LAN Side
kw.doc: Register a SIP phone on the LAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.

kw.name: Register Phone On WAN Side
Get Device Property
kw.doc: Get a property value from a device object.

kw.name: Register phone with SIP server
kw.doc: Register a phone with the SIP server.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Register a SIP phone on the WAN side of the CPE. Phone number is extracted from the device object's 'number' property.
Assign caller and callee by network location, register them, and set roles.

kw.name: Verify phone is idle
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone is in idle state
kw.doc: Verify phone is in idle state.

kw.name: Verify phone is idle
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone2 is in idle state
kw.doc: Verify phone is in idle state.

kw.name: Caller calls callee
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone dialing 3000... ✓ Phone wan_phone dialed 3000
kw.doc: Caller dials the callee's number.

kw.name: The callee phone should start ringing
kw.doc: Alias for Verify phone is ringing.

kw.name: Callee answers call
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 answering call... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 answered call
kw.doc: Callee answers incoming call.

kw.name: Both phones should be connected
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone reached connected state ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached connected state
kw.doc: Verify both phones are in connected state.

kw.name: Caller hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Caller hangs up the call.

kw.name: Verify SIP call terminated
kw.msg: ✓ SIP server terminated call (0 active calls)
kw.doc: Verify SIP server terminated the call.

kw.name: Both phones should return to idle state
kw.msg: ✓ Phone wan_phone reached idle state ✓ Phone wan_phone2 reached idle state
kw.doc: Verify both phones returned to idle state.

kw.name: Cleanup Voice Test
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Cleanup Single SIP Phone
Log
kw.arg: Phone is None - nothing to clean up
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up a single SIP phone - hang up any active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Clean up phones after each test. Uses Run Keyword And Ignore Error because variables may not be set if test was skipped or failed early.

test.doc: Extension: SIP signaling completes but RTP media path fails Requires: 2 WAN phones. In real scenario would inject network failure. This test verifies clean hangup and termination when media fails.

kw.name: Teardown Voice Test Environment
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone lan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone lan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Phone hangs up
kw.msg: Phone wan_phone2 hanging up... ✓ Phone wan_phone2 hung up
kw.doc: Hang up active call.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Clean up voice test environment. Safely hangs up any active calls on all discovered phones.

suite.doc:
UC-12348: User Makes a One-Way Call As a user, I want to make a voice call from one SIP phone to another so that I can establish voice communication.
Corresponds to tests/features/UC-12348 User makes a one-way call.feature
Device Requirements: - Most tests require 2 SIP phones minimum - UC-12348-Main-V4 requires 3 SIP phones - All phone numbers are obtained from device object properties

Boardfarm BDD Robot Framework Test Suites
This test suite contains Robot Framework implementations of BDD scenarios that correspond to the system use cases defined in requirements/.
All tests use scenario-aligned keyword libraries that mirror the pytest-bdd step definitions, providing consistent behavior across both frameworks.
Test Suites: - hello.robot: Basic smoke tests - remote_cpe_reboot.robot: UC-12347 Remote CPE Reboot - user_makes_one_way_call.robot: UC-12348 Voice Call Tests - acs_gui_device_management.robot: UC-ACS-GUI-01 GUI Management - device_class_initialization.robot: Device Class Tests
